AI Fleet Onboarding

Your Anthropic API Key
▼ expand
Free option: Get a free Google Gemini key at aistudio.google.com → "Get API key" — no credit card needed, just a Google account.
Paste your key below. It stays in this browser session only — never saved to our servers.
Tell me about your fleet in plain language, or upload your vessel documents (COI, registration, insurance). I'll read them and pre-fill your vessel profiles, certificates, and maintenance schedules automatically.
Supports PDF, images, Excel (.xlsx/.xls), and CSV. Documents are read once to extract vessel info, then discarded.
